sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval package for BLUE_ANTENA_COVER part MKK-000107 submitted to H&abyz by 천진정석전자.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a part approval record including cover sheet, revision history, material list, QC process/control plan, inspection criteria, and packaging specification.
keyPoints: The part name is BLUE_ANTENA_COVER and the part/model number is MKK-000107.
Applicable models listed are G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
The initial revision was established on 2025-07-17.
The raw material list identifies PC/PBT ENH2900 from Sabic.
The QC process chart marks Mass-Prod. and the control plan category marks PVS.

reviewFlags.reason: authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA or any regulatory authority.
No external standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
The source is an extracted spreadsheet with comma-separated table artifacts and minor OCR/text quality issues such as misspellings and fragmented headers.
